parents.subject: LU-19758 ptlrpc: do not leak path

commit.subject: LU-19775 tests: wait for applied limit in sanity-quota_96
commit.message:
LU-19775 tests: wait for applied limit in sanity-quota_96

sanity-quota_96("quota grant should be released when big files are
deleted") failed with: "DD should fail on first write". Wait until new
limits will be applied at OST0000 and OST0001 to address the problem.

Fixes: f472b887e3 ("LU-19068 quota: wait to release quota")
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=96,ONLY_REPEAT=300

Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I23fb9d44901536b6d2241f77386ecc39721ebe77
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63378
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
